title: David Blackman
text: Home * People * David Blackman David Blackman , an Australian chess player [1] , software developer, and as computer chess programmer author of the chess program Desperado , which has been under development since 1989, and played in most of the NC3 tournaments , and all the ANU Carbon-Silicon Tournaments before..
